At the entrance to Cafayate to refuel for the return home

reviews.comment:
en la confitería no aceptaban tarjeta de debito ni crédito. Pero cuando cargas combustible si te la toman, eso me pareció terrible y es igual en casi todo Cafayate.
Por lo demás el servicio y la atención en la estación de servicio es bueno, solo algo lento por la demanda.

(Translated by Google)
The confectionery shop didn't accept debit or credit cards. But they do accept them when you fill up your tank, which I found terrible, and it's the same in almost every station in Cafayate.
Otherwise, the service and attention at the gas station is good, just a bit slow due to demand.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3723316147645973523/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtMllqSzhnRRAB
